channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Pothole in former repair near petrol station, 26th March
item.description:
Traveling North from Cheltenham. There is a strip of tarmac which is shortly before the petrol station. It is in effect an inverted speed bump - former repair which has sunk. It is worse on the side nearest pavement
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cheltenham Road, Bishop's Cleeve
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Other FW6 Surface problem, 26th March
item.description:
Abrupt level difference around cover. Please ramp off 700x700x20mm Standard TM with temp FW close Stats (FW6 Abrupt Level Differences)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Obstructed Streetlight, 26th March
item.description:
The streetlights are too obscured to read the column numbers. However, the What3Words location of these 2 streetlights are: - lend.limes.tribe - brave.hurls.pull
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 12, Radnor Road, Hatherley, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 26th March
item.description:
15db Pothole CW 1400x900x50 Road closure with 15db Stats (CW6 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Numerous dangerous potholes, 26th March
item.description:
The whole length of Aggs Hill is affected. The road is virtually undrivable.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cotswold
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Other FW6 Surface problem, 26th March
item.description:
Fw abrupt level on verge Fill with topsoil 1600x600x90mm Give and take (FW6 Abrupt Level Differences)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 26th March
item.description:

item.title: TMC - Defects - Covers, Gratings & Frames problem, 26th March
item.description:
